name: BRINKER INTERNATIONAL, INC
summary: PART I General References to Brinker, the Company, we, us, and our in this Form10-K refer to Brinker International,Inc. and its subsidiaries and any predecessor companies of Brinker International,Inc. We own, develop, operate and franchise the Chilis Grill& Bar (Chilis) and Maggianos Little Italy (Maggianos) restaurant brands.
